# OpenCLI

> 把你已登录的浏览器，交给 CLI 和 Agent。
> OpenCLI reuses your local Chrome login and turns browser work into stable commands for CLI and AI agents.

## What OpenCLI does

OpenCLI turns your already logged-in local Chrome browser into a reliable command surface for CLI workflows and AI agents — no tokens, no API keys, no brittle scraping. Three modes:

1. **Built-in adapters** — 100+ sites pre-built: Twitter/X, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Zhihu, YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, HackerNews, and more
2. **Browser automation for AI agents** — Install the `opencli-browser` skill in Claude Code or Cursor, and the agent can navigate, click, type, extract, and screenshot any page via your logged-in browser
3. **Adapter authoring** — Write new site adapters end-to-end with `opencli-adapter-author` skill and `opencli browser` primitives

## Install

```
npm install -g @jackwener/opencli
```

Requires Node.js >= 20 and Chrome with the OpenCLI Browser Bridge extension.

## Key capabilities

- Zero LLM cost at runtime — no tokens consumed, run 10,000 times for free
- Account safe — reuses Chrome's logged-in state, credentials never leave the browser
- Deterministic — same command, same output schema, every time
- Pipeable — supports JSON, CSV, Markdown, YAML output formats
- Desktop app control — drive Electron apps (Cursor, Codex, ChatGPT App) via CDP
- Plugin system — install community adapters with `opencli plugin install github:user/repo`
- AI agent ready — browser primitives give AI agents a repeatable loop for any site interaction
- CLI hub — unified passthrough for gh, docker, vercel, wrangler, notion, discord, telegram, and more

## Supported sites (selected)

Twitter/X, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Zhihu, LinkedIn, YouTube, Reddit, HackerNews, Weibo, Amazon, Bloomberg, V2EX, Boss直聘, Douyin, Spotify, WeChat articles, Xiaoyuzhou podcasts, NotebookLM, Claude, Gemini, GeoGebra, GitHub Trending (plugin), Juejin (plugin), and 80+ more

Run `opencli list` for the full live registry.

## Desktop app adapters

Cursor, Trae CN, Codex, Antigravity, ChatGPT App, ChatWise, Discord, Doubao, Trae SOLO — controlled via Chrome DevTools Protocol.

## Skills for AI agents

- `opencli-browser` — navigate, click, type, extract, screenshot any page
- `opencli-adapter-author` — write new adapters end-to-end
- `opencli-autofix` — repair broken adapters
- `opencli-usage` — command and site reference

Install with: `npx skills add jackwener/opencli`

## Key links

- Website: https://opencli.info
- GitHub: https://github.com/jackwener/opencli
